## Assistant
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-18T23:31:34.806Z

The latest Phase 2 handoff is directly relevant to Phase 3: `JournalWorkspace` is gaining its own nested `player-progression` ceremony host with exact stage/parchment/ink targets, while PageFlip stays a deeper isolated runtime surface. That gives Phase 3 a likely safe chapter-release foundation, but I’m still withholding design and edits until the final API, tests, and ownership are settled.

I1 is being told not to consume that API; C3 will be reopened within its original files for a bounded repair after the exact audit details land.\"},{\"id\":\"item-144\",\"text\":\"Independent verification found two release-blocking runtime issues and several bounded component defects before integrated acceptance.\\n\\nV2 completed — component audit: **fix-needed**\\n\\n- High: ArtifactInspection’s dialog-local targets lacked a host-bound export capability.\\n- Medium: stale callback delivery, duplicate altar heading IDs, missing local pointer inertness, misleading permanent companion owner markers, and an invalid engraving property declaration.\\n- Positive evidence: all six focused suites still passed 16/16; key identity, semantic/GSAP separation, focus trapping, and companion cardinality were confirmed.\\n\\nV3 major findings in progress:\\n\\n- `artifact-award` treats the Motion layout destination as a write-claimed scene target, which will conflict once Motion correctly holds its own layout lease.\\n- `withElement(\\\"transform\\\", ...)` validates one property but then lets a GSAP tween also write opacity/filter/etc. from the same vars object. That is not fail-closed.\\n\\nRepair topology:\\n\\n- **C1c (core):** add multi-property permit validation, identity-only external target support, and a synchronous runtime-owned target hook that gates Motion props until its provider lease is granted.\\n- **S2b (scenes):** derive/validate every GSAP-written property, reject unknown writes, and make the artifact destination identity-only for handoff.\\n- **C2/C3/C4 repairs:** address V2 findings and migrate high-risk Motion targets to the new gated hook after C1c’s snippet.\\n- **V3 remains read-only:** it will rerun against the repairs; none of its current output is discarded.\\n\\nThese lanes retain their original exclusive files, so no write ownership changes collide with P2, A2, or I1. Parent integration remains fail-closed for affected bindings.\"}]}", "type": "input_text"}]

That is not fail-closed.\\n\\nRepair topology:\\n\\n- **C1c (core):** add multi-property permit validation, identity-only external target support, and a synchronous runtime-owned target hook that gates Motion props until its provider lease is granted.\\n- **S2b (scenes):** derive/validate every GSAP-written property, reject unknown writes, and make the artifact destination identity-only for handoff.\\n- **C2/C3/C4 repairs:** address V2 findings and migrate high-risk Motion targets to the new gated hook after C1c’s snippet.\\n- **V3 remains read-only:** it will rerun against the repairs; none of its current output is discarded.\\n\\nThese lanes retain their original exclusive files, so no write ownership changes collide with P2, A2, or I1. Parent integration remains fail-closed for affected bindings.\"}]}", "type": "input_text"}]

V2 will re-audit before acceptance because the handoff mentions a host-identity remount that may be unnecessary after C1c’s ref-retry fix.\\n\\nV3 also found a deeper capability-authenticity issue: external resolution found a live record by ID but did not require the exact minted handle object. V2 will re-audit the combined C2/C3/C4 repairs once C3’s stable-node correction finishes.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_g6Ymascs99PPKDWNVB8nz9KR\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7783-16b1-7bf2-aa52-387523435b7e\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/p2_pageflip_boundary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_fEFtrMYBKpEUuptPHnTRU6LH\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7784-4bc0-7a93-bb85-fa4e71cefd70\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/a2_access_quartermaster\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_GPYviQKimxfvOOIFs4vw8E65\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7770-6893-7363-b939-6a7ae1997e56\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/c1_core_runtime\"},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-157\",\"text\":\"P2 PageFlip/journal lane completed and released:\\n\\n- StPageFlip construction is now blocked behind one atomic provider lease covering transform, clip-path, width, and height.\\n- Denial of any property prevents construction and renders the readable fallback.\\n- Source/clone identity, ID/IDREF sanitation, generation revocation, nested host exclusion, exact chapter target readiness, and I1’s ready-only ceremony-host callback are wired.\\n- Focused gate: 4 files / 27 tests; lint and diff checks clean.\\n- Remaining evidence is appropriately reserved for browser validation: real drag/temporary-clone behavior, six viewport geometries, and assistive technology.\\n\\nThe only reported typecheck issue is a C1 test fixture already assigned to C1c; P2 has no owned diagnostics.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_Bh21uInO4nCUeD7AXxTwa2cs\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7770-6893-7363-b939-6a7ae1997e56\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/c1_core_runtime\"},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-158\",\"text\":\"C3’s stable-node repair is complete: the Motion shell/button no longer remount when host authority arrives, the identical altar button retains focus, and all 13 focused tests plus static checks pass. Its slot is released again.\\n\\nV3 then found a critical final-state leak in the Director: reconcile policies were not carrying the exact external destination into handoff receipts, and `handoff`-lifetime capabilities were never revoked after reconciliation. C1c’s earlier 103-test gate does not cover this new finding, so core acceptance remains open while it adds exact handoff identity and policy-safe revocation tests.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_cwFcXYD186bq9ACK6IKKLDif\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7770-6893-7363-b939-6a7ae1997e56\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/c1_core_runtime\"}]}]}", "type": "input_text"}]

**Timestamp:** 2026-07-19T00:00:48.102Z

the last bounded repair wave:\\n\\n- **S2b is fully accepted:** 58/58 tests, clean static/type gates, and V3 reports no remaining scene-layer blocker.\\n- **C1c is close but not yet accepted:** its 106-test cleanup expansion still revokes handoff handles before GSAP context reversion, and target liveness flips too early relative to the frozen cleanup order.\\n- **V4 found P2 blockers:** PageFlip clone identities are not yet registered into host authority, `journal-open` remains executable in the showcase, and stale clone records retain detached DOM across repeated updates.\\n- **V4 found A2 accessibility gaps:** Quartermaster confirmation lacks a real focus trap/background isolation, and legacy login needs busy/focus recovery semantics.\\n- **V2’s only remaining component issue:** keyed TreasureAltar tombstones, already assigned to C3.\\n\\nThese are bounded repairs in the original owners’ files; the overall architecture and accepted scene/reconciliation work remain intact.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_7aGHEkG0iatrvY2tPRDDIHNj\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7770-6893-7363-b939-6a7ae1997e56\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/c1_core_runtime\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_BwrObs5vgIgekWdpbgz39cv3\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7784-4bc0-7a93-bb85-fa4e71cefd70\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/a2_access_quartermaster\"},{\"type\":\"reasoning\",\"id\":\"item-166\",\"summary\":[\"**Planning gate: 6 files / 22 tests, full typecheck, and static checks all pass.\\n\\nOnly browser-rendered Motion geometry/timing, stacking/overflow, and full handoff reconciliation remain for the integrated browser gate. V2 is complete and its slot is released.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-168\",\"text\":\"C1c and S2b are now independently accepted.\\n\\n- **C1c final:** 8 files / 107 tests, full typecheck, lint, formatting, diff, and selector checks pass. Exact handle authenticity, multi-property permits, identity-only targets, Motion gating, PageFlip runtime leases, external-handle cleanup, frozen cleanup order, failure-continuing retained teardown, and idempotence are covered.\\n- **V3 independent verdict:** PASS, 5 files / 78 tests. It confirmed the 16/4/5/3 scene model, 13 source-grounded dual-host callers, query-free production builders, fail-closed GSAP writes, identity-only artifact handoff, and zero leaked claims/handles/invocations across failure cleanup.\\n\\nBoth slots are released. Core/scene architecture is no longer an open risk; remaining implementation work is P2’s PageFlip authority lifecycle, A2’s Quartermaster accessibility repair, and I1 parent tests/integration.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-169\",\"text\":\"A2’s V4 accessibility repair is complete and released:\\n\\n- Quartermaster confirmation now portals outside an inert/aria-hidden background, traps Tab/Shift+Tab, redirects escaped focus, supports Escape, and restores the exact trigger.\\n- Legacy login now exposes busy state, disables repeated submits, preserves accepted state through refresh, and restores the username field/readable error on every failure path.\\n- Validation: Quartermaster 14/14; full A2 37/37; typecheck, lint, formatting, and diff checks pass.\\n\\nOnly real-browser portal stacking, native `inert`, and keyboard-focus behavior remain for final validation.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_hc5ZUyhVBG56dPp9jIhiYEjg\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f778e-9b07-7141-a0a2-54810c2ee18d\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/i1_player_integration\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_4wVO5UC6LNNq50URbcuoqDAZ\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7783-16b1-7bf2-aa52-387523435b7e\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/p2_pageflip_boundary\"}]}]}", "type": "input_text"}]

**Timestamp:** 2026-07-19T00:19:46.000Z

I’m preserving the no-write Phase 3 boundary until the rerun is genuinely clean.

Its outer page remains diagnostic, but each active synthetic fixture must mount an inner authentic host using the production contract’s allowed kind (`gateway`, `access`, or `player-progression`). S5’s scope remains its same two files; no core ownership or production contract is changing.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_AxKFfPMgIsptDnKrVuOmYoKE\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f77c6-d21e-71f3-9483-2973f1017c7c\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/s5_showcase_host\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_t6u5dFsN8QCDvURMmDMnZW1F\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f77a3-f214-7c80-87b5-b28537f3576f\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/v4_access_pageflip_audit\"},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-211\",\"text\":\"V4’s final PageFlip gate is now PASS. It independently verified complete local ID/IDREF rewriting, collision-free identities, zero hidden-source registrations, WeakMap-only orientation authority, deterministic hydration/fresh remount identity, bounded cleanup, and fake-scene retirement. Evidence: 35/35 PageFlip tests, exact lint, and full typecheck. Only genuine real-browser geometry/focus/assistive-technology checks remain.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-212\",\"text\":\"A2R is complete and released. It changed only `AccessGate.tsx` and its test, giving the decorative invitation/ink/seal targets deliberate bounded geometry while keeping semantic controls outside GSAP ownership. Real-registry preflight now sees one host, six targets, and no required failures; the committed pose survives delayed routing. Access tests passed 12/12, the full A2 group 43/43, plus lint, formatting, typecheck, and diff checks.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_LjlWG1c9wMuLTW8qBPSnnDiI\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f77a3-f214-7c80-87b5-b28537f3576f\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/v4_access_pageflip_audit\"},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-213\",\"text\":\"J1 is complete and released. It added an idempotent layout-phase teardown registry that synchronously aborts opening/fetch work, closes EventSource and handlers, removes the key listener, and clears both timer classes before DOM-disconnect cleanup can drift. Its regression returns every tracked resource to zero at 0 virtual ms across 20 double-dispose cycles; 12/12 tests, typecheck, lint, formatting, and diff checks pass. D4 is rechecking that narrow repair before browser proof.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_67QCwiEKr5H1bERyJl58uhKn\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f77be-916e-77d1-87f6-69e9bc7ec22a\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/d4_e2e_failure_diagnosis\"},{\"type\":\"reasoning\",\"id\":\"item-214\",\"summary\":[\"**Planning in-app browser integration**\"]},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-215\",\"text\":\"Two repairs have cleared their focused gates:\\n\\n- I1R is complete and released: `journal-opening` is now the real boxed host, its targets register to that host rather than the persistent parent, and real-registry tests prove presentation, sibling isolation, handoff release, and full baseline cleanup. Player/integrated tests passed 29/29 plus all static checks.\\n- A2R’s independent V4 audit is PASS; only native computed layout and live accessibility behavior remain for browser validation.\\n- H1’s Harbor implementation is green in 36 focused tests; its full typecheck is waiting only for S5’s in-progress showcase edits to settle.\\n\\n\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_cYg2LhN7oH9oUUBEO8UGSVmI\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7782-a599-7970-8277-60542e3828a6\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/s2_scene_migration\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_GdCS6r1l1PNdqMRrkmxcr8KO\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f7793-643b-7c73-a95f-782daa6c49af\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/v3_scene_core_audit\"},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-216\",\"text\":\"D4’s independent J1 audit found one real stale-session race and showed that the new tests exercised only the teardown primitive, not the mounted component. J1 is reopening its same two files to capture the per-effect registry instead of consulting a newer session’s ref, then add actual StrictMode mount/unmount, 20-cycle, deferred old-session, reconnect, and normal-fulfillment coverage. The browser’s `<250 ms` probe remains the deciding runtime evidence.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_V6z1dByQoziWgoDY5L76DTD5\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f77c6-8e2b-7fe1-a9c6-d309be814801\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/j1_journal_teardown\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_dguPkZLhfZPIpVv81PB886Sn\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f77c6-d21e-71f3-9483-2973f1017c7c\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/s5_showcase_host\"}]}]}", "type": "input_text"}]

Phase 3 is still held read-only while those three repair lanes close and the authoritative gate reruns.

F1W and P2R own disjoint paths.\\n- **Non-scope:** No StaffSignIn, E2E assertion, database/server/ports, Git, docs, or sync.\\n- **Completion:** Focused tests plus typecheck/lint/format/diff, then release ownership.\\n- **Integration:** I’ll review the geometry change before focused Chromium validation.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_4KhjJdpirdhafy0y20qATvQI\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f77e1-8403-7bc3-908a-f74f265966ea\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/q1r_quartermaster_transition\"},{\"type\":\"reasoning\",\"id\":\"item-245\",\"summary\":[\"**Planning isolated Playwright test setup**\",\"**Planning isolated runtime with temp database**\"]},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-246\",\"text\":\"**P2R complete — output reviewed, slot released**\\n\\n- Corrected the E2E source scope to count only the canonical source root while separately proving runtime clones carry zero source markers.\\n- Fixed a real StPageFlip queue race by dispatching a pending `flipTo` on the next animation frame after the authoritative `read` event, with teardown cancellation.\\n- Stabilized tombstone sequencing against authoritative page state and used the correct non-executable control name.\\n- Validation passed: **29/29 focused PageFlip tests**, typecheck, lint, formatting, diff check, and Playwright collection.\\n\\nThe change is integrated in the shared worktree; The assertion now derives one exact expected logical page from the book’s proven orientation and cross-checks the visible primary’s orientation/index plus counter text—portrait Page 3, landscape Page 4.\\n\\nI’m rerunning only the two Chromium cases with two workers.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"reasoning\",\"id\":\"item-272\",\"summary\":[\"**Identifying PageFlipBoundary update bug**\",\"**Fixing PageFlip boundary page indexing**\",\"**Identifying PageFlipBoundary update bug**\",\"**Fixing PageFlip boundary page indexing**\"]},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-273\",\"text\":\"The stricter orientation check exposed one genuine boundary defect before the final suite:\\n\\n- Chromium’s visible counter and rendered spread are on Page 4.\\n- The exported “current visible primary” authority is stale on Page 2.\\n\\nThe cause is likely that the `flip` event reports the new logical page, but the subsequent `read` handler re-queries StPageFlip’s lagging `getCurrentPageIndex()` and moves authority back to the prior spread. The worker’s result is not yet treated as independently verified; I’m reviewing the exact diff, then launching the small gates concurrently.\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"reasoning\",\"id\":\"item-291\",\"summary\":[\"**Planning concurrent test execution**\"]},{\"type\":\"agentMessage\",\"id\":\"item-292\",\"text\":\"**Focused validation wave started**\\n\\n| Shard | Scope | Concurrency |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| T1 | PageFlipBook + boundary unit tests | Independent |\\n| T2 | Strict typecheck | Independent |\\n| T3 | Exact ESLint + Prettier + diff check | Independent |\\n| T4 | 458-record reconciliation validator | Independent |\\n| B1 | Chromium + WebKit full/tombstone PageFlip cases | Four browser workers against isolated port 3100 |\\n\\nThese are all read-only with respect to source and share no mutable application state. I’m fixing that initial-state adoption and adding a focused regression before the next two-case WebKit rerun.\\n\\n**Subagent restarted — P2R7: initial orientation truth**\\n\\n- **Mode/ownership:** Write-enabled only for the verified existing [PageFlipBook.tsx](C:/Users/kkids/Documents/Codex_TreasureHunt_Phase2/src/components/animation/PageFlipBook.tsx) and [PageFlipBook.test.tsx](C:/Users/kkids/Documents/Codex_TreasureHunt_Phase2/src/components/animation/PageFlipBook.test.tsx)\\n- **Goal:** Adopt `book.getOrientation()` at initialization so root class, boundary, current primary, and counter agree immediately\\n- **Non-scope:** E2E file, all other source, server/database/browser, packages, Git, full suites, synchronization\\n- **Completion:** Authentic portrait-init regression plus focused tests/lint/format/typecheck; coordinator reviews and reruns the two WebKit cases\\n- **Resources/integration:** Coordinator remains sole runtime, browser, database, validation, Git, and finalization owner; 12 direct-worker slots remain available, with no other useful writer until these two files are released\\n\",\"phase\":\"commentary\"},{\"type\":\"subAgentActivity\",\"id\":\"call_dopOsOzw5N1vEYEF51Ug8v9V\",\"kind\":\"interacted\",\"agentThreadId\":\"019f77e0-ca14-7142-917b-41c3d95e25ad\",\"agentPath\":\"/root/p2r_pageflip_browser\"}]}]}", "type": "input_text"}]
